title: ClaudeCredentials
description: authd.ts's ClaudeCredentials — the wire/lease shape accepted by parseClaudeCredentials and emitted by `claude-box check-in`. NOT byte-for-byte the real on-disk $CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR/.credentials.json (that file only has claudeAiOauth + mcpOAuth, written by `claude auth login`) — this shape also bundles oauthAccount, which actually lives in .claude.json (see claude-json.schema.json), because check-in captures both files' relevant pieces into one blob for authd to carry as an opaque passthrough. mcpOAuth exists on the real on-disk file but is not currently read or forwarded by claude-box's authd/lease flow.

oauthAccount.description: Passed through opaquely by authd (see claude-json.schema.json for its real shape) — optional here since not every caller of parseClaudeCredentials provides it (e.g. authd-continuity.ts's staged test fixtures).

refreshToken.description: sk-ant-ort01-... single-use rotating token. authd keeps this host-side ONLY — never forwarded to a box (see authd.ts's toAccessTokenOnly).

mcpOAuth.description: Per-MCP-server OAuth state, keyed by an opaque "<serverName>|<hash>" string. Not currently read or carried by authd/check-in/lease — a box that needs authenticated MCP servers gets none of this today.
